title: hydranthelium obovatum
intro: Hydranthelium obovatum, also known as the "White Horse" plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It is a perennial grass with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is known for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat fever, respiratory issues, and skin problems. Hydranthelium obovatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often consumed as a treatment for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing.
